Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class OrderCostPreviewRequestCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.OrderCostPreviewRequestCreate
public class OrderCostPreviewRequestCreate extends Object
OrderCostPreviewRequestCreate

Request object for retrieving fixed income costs

  • Method Details

    • assetType

      public OrderCostPreviewRequestCreateAssetType assetType()
      The type of asset being evaluated in cost calculations.

    • brokerCapacity

      public Optional<OrderCostPreviewRequestCreateBrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity()
      Capacity used in determining the order cost. Defaults to "AGENCY" if no value specified.

    • identifier

      public String identifier()
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public OrderCostPreviewRequestCreateIdentifierType identifierType()
      The identifier type of the asset being sought

      A limit price definition

    • parent

      public String parent()
      The parent resource where this order will be created. Format: accounts/{account_id}

    • quantity

      public DecimalCreate quantity()
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

      Capacity used in determining the order cost. Defaults to "AGENCY" if no value specified.
